raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2043 directs the Cal/OSHA standards board to adopt occupational safety and health standards for COVID-19 infection prevention.",
    "AB 2164 deploys telehealth services for rural and community health centers.",
    "AB 2165 expands the availability of electronic filing to all state trial courts to improve access for rural communities.",
    "AB 3005 facilitates the expedited construction of the Anderson Dam Seismic Retrofit Project to ensure regional safety and water supply.",
    "AB 2954 requires the California Air Resources Board to identify an overall climate goal for California's natural and working lands.",
    "AB 3153 provides a secure place for individuals to store bicycles while incentivizing the development of more affordable housing units.",
    "AB 2957 allows wineries to refill consumer-supplied bottles in their tasting rooms to aid economic recovery from COVID-19."
  ]
}
```
